app.name: ClaudeQuest
health.title: Platform status
health.error: Could not reach the server. Please try again shortly.
health.success: All good! The backend is up.
auth.login.title: Sign in to ClaudeQuest
auth.login.subtitle: Use the credentials provided by your organization.
auth.login.errors.accountNotActive: This account isn't active. Contact your administrator.
auth.login.errors.generic: Couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again shortly.
auth.forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
auth.forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a recovery link, if it's registered.
auth.forgotPassword.success: If that email is registered, you'll receive a recovery link shortly.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set a new password
auth.resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetPassword.success: Password changed successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPassword.missingToken: Invalid recovery link. Please request a new one.
auth.resetPassword.errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.resetPassword.errors.invalidToken: This recovery link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.resetPassword.errors.generic: Couldn't change your password right now. Please try again shortly.

sidebar.userMenu.label: User menu

dashboard.streak.title: Streak
dashboard.ranking.title: Ranking
dashboard.ranking.empty: You're not on any ranking yet.
dashboard.nextLesson.title: Next lesson

admin.title: Admin Portal
admin.subtitle: ClaudeQuest's operational center for preparing user, content, gamification, AI, and analytics management without direct database access.
admin.readiness.title: First admin slice
admin.readiness.description: This shell enables secure admin navigation and makes clear which modules still depend on the next backlog endpoints.
admin.modules.title: Admin modules
admin.modules.description: Surfaces planned in the vault, kept honest until the CRUD flows are ready.
admin.modules.users.title: Users
admin.modules.users.description: CRUD, import, export, permissions, and learning history.
admin.modules.content.title: Content
admin.modules.content.description: Schools, tracks, modules, levels, missions, publishing, and versioning.
admin.modules.gamification.title: Gamification
admin.modules.gamification.description: XP, badges, achievements, ranking, events, seasons, and rewards.
admin.modules.ai.title: AI
admin.modules.ai.description: Providers, prompts, rubrics, models, fallback, costs, and correction history.
admin.modules.analytics.title: Analytics
admin.modules.analytics.description: KPIs, retention, engagement, skills, costs, and reports.
admin.modules.certificates.title: Certificates
admin.modules.certificates.description: Templates, issuing, validation, reissuing, cancellation, and exports.
admin.modules.settings.title: Settings
admin.modules.settings.description: Organizations, plans, policies, branding, integrations, and security.
admin.modules.flags.title: Feature flags
admin.modules.flags.description: Activation, segmentation, scheduling, and gradual feature control.
